overall.description: First-person vehicle gameplay footage from a sci-fi game, showing a rover driving across a reddish desert planet surface toward a distant structure. The player briefly scans the surroundings before continuing forward. Features a detailed HUD dashboard and hazy orange atmosphere.

agents.ego_description: piloting the rover across the desert terrain toward a distant structure on the horizon

large settlement or outpost visible on the horizon
reddish-orange desert ground with scattered boulders

segments.scene_description: The segment shows steady forward driving through a desert wasteland from a vehicle's first-person perspective. The dashboard HUD is visible at the bottom of the frame. The terrain consists of reddish sand with scattered rock formations, and a distant structure is visible ahead on the horizon.

events.description: pilot pans camera left to scan the rocky terrain, revealing a gloved hand on the joystick
pilot pans camera right to check surroundings before returning to center

agents.ego_description: scanning the surrounding rock formations while maintaining vehicle momentum

entered.detail: prominent yellowish rock outcrop passing by on the left side

segments.scene_description: The driver briefly surveys the surroundings by panning the camera left and right while continuing to drive. A large rock cluster passes by on the left, and the pilot's gloved hand is visible on the control joystick during the maneuver.

agents.ego_description: continuing the journey toward the distant structure across the open desert

segments.scene_description: The vehicle resumes steady forward motion toward the distant objective. The rocky outcrop passes behind the vehicle, leaving open desert terrain ahead. The dashboard remains visible as the journey continues across the barren landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective of a vehicle traversing a reddish desert wasteland toward a distant horizon structure. It begins with steady forward motion across sandy terrain and scattered rock formations, with a detailed dashboard HUD visible at the bottom of the frame. As the vehicle progresses, the camera pans left and right to survey the surroundings, momentarily revealing a gloved hand on the control joystick as a large rock cluster passes by on the left. The scene then shifts back to a centered forward trajectory, leaving the rocky outcrop behind in favor of an open, barren landscape. Finally, the vehicle continues its steady advance across the desert, maintaining its course toward the objective under a hazy orange sky.
